docs-update-readme-2026-07-11.description: Update README: remove stale 'primary monitor only' claim, add Settings/persistence features, correct multi-monitor section, expand project structure.

fix-monitor-index-2026-07-10.description: Prevent IndexOutOfRangeException when monitors are unplugged. Fresh fix on current master (settings-persistence included). Build: 0 errors, 0 warnings.

persist-control-visibility-2026-07-10.description: Persist isControlWindowVisible in AppSettings. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

eng-dependabot-2026-07-10.description: Add .github/dependabot.yml for weekly NuGet + Actions updates.

test-appsettings-allprops-2026-07-09.description: 32 xUnit tests covering all 8 AppSettings properties.

improve-color-temp-hotkeys-2026-07-08.description: Add Ctrl+Shift+Left/Right hotkeys for colour temperature.

feature-start-with-windows-2026-07-08.description: Add Start with Windows tray toggle.

fix-persist-settings-2026-07-08.description: SUPERSEDED: Settings persistence was added by PR #68 (garrettcampbell3).

perf-mouse-coalesce-2026-07-06.description: Coalesce mouse hook dispatches with Interlocked.CompareExchange.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI

notes: 2026-07-11 run (01:13 UTC): Tasks 2+10. Task 2: no new human activity on any issues (#24 has 2 RA comments, no response). Task 10: Updated README.md to reflect current app state - removed stale 'primary monitor only' language, added Settings window/persistence features, corrected Multi-Monitor section, expanded project structure. PR #68 (garrettcampbell3) added settings persistence - fix-persist-settings branches are now superseded.
